## DEFAULT\_CONSTRAINTS variable

> This API is provided as a beta preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

Default constraint configuration that allows all features. All constraints default to "off" (allowed).

**Signature:**

```typescript
DEFAULT_CONSTRAINTS: ResolvedConstraintConfig
```
